item.title: First Post!
item.description: Hello World! This is the first post of my blog. I have decided to start this blog because I found I really need a place to post thoughts and ideas that come up with my mind recently. Here, I will try to blog about technologies, ideas, and maybe some ponderings about my life so far.

item.title: Welcome to Jekyll!
item.description: You'll find this post in your _posts directory - edit this post and re-build (or run with the -w switch) to see your changes! To add new posts, simply add a file in the _posts directory that follows the convention: YYYY-MM-DD-name-of-post.ext.
